pr_title: fix: add option-quality reminder to call-2/3 prompts
pr_description: llama3.1 calls 2/3 degrade to 2-3 word labels (~38% of levers) while call-1 produces full sentences Root cause: quality contract in system prompt decays in attention as the name-exclusion blacklist grows Fix: one-line reminder in call-2/3 prompt restating the "complete strategic sentence" requirement Zero risk for other models — they already produce full-sentence options
